string.description: Cadence values for scheduled trigger nodes.

Template hint for the flow's intent. Drives FE editor selection and the
activation-time minimum-shape rule. Extend as more template types are added.

single_nested.description: Basic user information for UI display.

A single custom event (``CustomEvent.to_json``).

``extra="allow"`` keeps the open tail for the conditionally-injected
``ENTITY_PERMISSIONS`` keys while still emitting a named ``$ref``.
